constants.name: DEFAULT_CONFIG
constants.description: Default configuration dictionary containing version, depth settings, box size thresholds, depth profiles, file types, exclude patterns, and output settings

methods.name: __init__
methods.description: Initialize the configuration with a project root path

methods.name: _load_config
methods.description: Load configuration from file or return defaults

methods.name: _merge_config
methods.description: Deep merge user config into defaults

methods.name: should_process_file
methods.description: Check if file should be processed based on config

methods.name: get_depth_profile
methods.signature: get_depth_profile(self, depth: str | None = None) -> dict
methods.description: Get settings for a specific depth level

methods.name: get_box_threshold
methods.signature: get_box_threshold(self, depth: str | None = None) -> dict
methods.description: Get box size threshold for a specific depth
